subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the Fragrances of Holiness! The Light of Reality gave sight unto thine eye, the Call of God gave hearing unto thine ear
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @service to others; to the Cause of God
